text: Publish a public showcase post of the shipped Aimparency agent and tag BuilderShip organizers
description: The actual "application" mechanism: post the recorded demo (from the demo sub-aim) publicly — short thread/video framing Aimparency as "AI becoming autonomous in the world of humans" — and tag Composio/Nebius/Tavily/OpenClaw. Low cost, high visibility, and useful even if we never attend or aren't selected. Deadline-sensitive: build/visibility phase closes ~June 12. Depends on having a credible demo first; do not post a weak artifact.

status.comment: Blocked on the demo artifact; time-boxed (~June 12).
